title: What Scripture actually says about humility (it's not weakness)
caption:
Humility isn't shrinking.

The word men have heard for decades is "be humble" — but the version they were handed looks like apologizing for existing, playing small, never holding a position. That's not what Micah 6:8 is describing.

Scripture puts humility next to justice and kindness — it's the posture of a man actively doing things, not retreating from them. Moses led a nation. The text calls him the most humble man alive. Those aren't in tension.

C.S. Lewis said it plainly: the humble man doesn't think less of himself, he thinks of himself less. Because he knows the source.

Pride locks you into the version of the story where you're always right. Humility keeps you moveable — and a man who can be corrected can be trusted with more.

Walk humbly. It's the hardest thing on that list, and the one that holds the other two up.

#faith #humility #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #scripture #micah6 #christianity #mensministry #discipleship
